title: 過去を語る②（印象的な授業）
question: Describe an interesting lesson you have attended.
question_jp: 参加した中で興味深かった授業について話してください。
model_answer: I once attended an amazing workshop at a job fair.
It was the best lesson I have ever had because the instructor was witty and unassuming, telling hilarious jokes.
On top of that, the lesson was absolutely riveting because he related everything to the real world.
He involved everyone, and it was all interactive, which really suited my learning style.

items.meaning: 出しゃばらない・謙虚な
魅力的な・引きつける
夢中にさせる・面白い
巻き込む・参加させる

drills.jp: 講師は機知に富み謙虚で、とても面白い冗談を言った。
drills.model_en: The instructor was witty and unassuming, telling hilarious jokes.

drills.jp: その授業は現実世界に結びつけていたので、本当に夢中になった。
drills.model_en: The lesson was absolutely riveting because he related it to the real world.

drills.jp: 彼は全員を巻き込み、双方向的で私の学び方に合っていた。
drills.model_en: He involved everyone, and it was interactive, which suited my learning style.
